TVL$0StatusTestnet
Request early access
Tranched yield protocol  ·  Built on Mantle

Choose your slice of on-chain yield.

Strata splits a basket of real-world and on-chain yield into three risk tiers. Pick the one that fits, senior, mezzanine, or junior, and see every move the protocol makes on-chain.

Request early access●  Live on Mantle Sepolia
Senior  ·  capital preservation
Mezzanine  ·  balanced
Junior  ·  residual upside

01 / Tranches

Three claims on the same cashflow.

One pool of yield, sliced into three tiers. You choose the tier. Losses absorb from the bottom up; yield distributes from the top down.

01 / Senior

Senior

First on yield · last on loss
5.4% target APY

Steady real-world yield. Paid first, drawn down last.

Ondo USDYEthena sUSDe
02 / Mezzanine

Mezzanine

Second claim · balanced
9.2% target APY

Staked ETH and curated Mantle strategies, sized to a fixed risk budget.

mETH · Mantle VaultCIAN strategies
03 / Junior

Junior

Residual upside · first loss
18+% target APY

Leveraged positions, LP rewards, and a labeled CMO sleeve. Highest yield, first to absorb loss.

Leveraged + LPCMO sleeve

02 / Agents

Five agents do the work an asset manager would.

Each agent has an on-chain identity, a public strategy document, and a reputation that grows only through verified actions.

01

Scout

Yield sourcing

Tracks yield-bearing positions across Mantle and publishes a ranked Yield Map to IPFS.

On-chain outputYield Map
02

Architect

Portfolio

Reads the Yield Map and proposes allocations for each tranche. Cannot execute without a risk verdict.

On-chain outputAllocation
03

Sentinel

Risk

Independent risk desk. Runs duration, depeg, contract, and correlation models. Gates every execution.

On-chain outputRisk verdict
04

Operator

Hedging

Acts on hedge signals through Byreal Perps. Every fill carries a pointer back to the signal that triggered it.

On-chain outputHedge fill
05

Compliance

Policy

Verifies credentials at deposit and publishes reusable Jurisdiction Policy NFTs other protocols can subscribe to.

On-chain outputReceipt + Policy

03 / Verifiability

Audit it like a smart contract.

Every decision is preceded by a public strategy and followed by an on-chain event. The whole protocol is queryable, citable, and reusable.

01
Strategies, signed and versioned.

Each agent publishes its strategy to IPFS, referenced from its identity NFT. Read what an agent intends before watching it act.

02
Decisions with reasoning hashes.

Every proposal, verdict, fill, and receipt is an on-chain event. Trace the full agent loop end-to-end from any line.

03
Compliance as public infrastructure.

Jurisdiction Policy NFTs and risk verdicts are reusable. Other Mantle protocols can subscribe to them directly.

Live event stream, samplechain · 5000

04 / Ecosystem

Built on what already works.

Strata composes existing yield primitives, identity standards, and risk infrastructure into a single tranched product on Mantle.

Mantle

Settlement layer
  • Sepolia testnet
  • Mainnet at v1

Yield sources

Backing assets
  • Ondo USDY
  • Ethena sUSDe
  • mETH · Mantle Vault
  • CIAN strategies

Infrastructure

Identity & risk
  • ERC-8004 identities
  • IPFS strategies
  • Byreal Perps · hedging

Yield, structured the way it should be.

Strata is launching on Mantle. Early access opens with onboarding for all three tiers and your first Compliance Receipt.

v1 testnet · senior tranche US-restricted at launch

Tranched RWA yield · Built on Mantle
